response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned staff-level generalist with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, and genuinely relevant recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years shipping production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience amounts to little more than a year; the resume shows no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or deep work on a major cloud platform. His teaching and workshop background suggests customer-facing aptitude, but the core GenAI qualifications gap is too large for a staff forward-deployed GenAI role.
strengths: Recent hands-on work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly matching a key technology in the role
15+ years of broad production engineering experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js skills and staff-level titles
Demonstrated mentorship and stakeholder-facing communication through courses, workshops, and conference talks
concerns: Roughly 1 year of AI-related experience versus the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions
No evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or observability pipelines
Cloud platform experience appears incidental (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployment) rather than designing AI systems on major clouds

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector database, and Python evidence
MCP and agentic tooling experience plus staff-level engineering breadth
